title: OpenPauw: an open-source Van der Pauw measurement system
description: A complete hardware, firmware, and software stack for automated four-terminal Van der Pauw sheet-resistance and resistivity measurements: a custom KiCAD analog-switching board (MAX328 multiplexers driven over I2C via an MCP23017 I/O expander), C++ firmware for the Adafruit Feather RP2040, and a Python host driver for a Keithley DMM6500. The board's assembly guide is generated with kibuilder.

creators.name: Nakamura, Matthew
creators.affiliation: Nanosystems Lab, University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa
